about: One of the fastest growing upscale lifestyle hotel takeover event organizers in the Midwest, voted Lifestyle Club of the Year by ALA. Hosts complete multi-day BYOB hotel takeovers featuring dance floors, themed playrooms, pool parties, BDSM demos, and couples classes across multiple cities.
